title: 编程型 agent：text_editor + bash 组合

body.overview: 编程型 agent 使用经典的软件开发循环：text_editor 读写文件，bash 运行测试和构建命令。这是最标准的 coding agent 模式——查看代码、编辑、运行测试、重复。两个工具都是 client-executed（客户端执行），你的应用控制哪些文件和命令可被访问。

components.name: text_editor
components.role: 读取和修改源代码文件

components.name: bash
components.role: 运行测试、构建命令和其他 shell 操作

body.flow: 1. Claude 用 text_editor 查看代码 → 2. 用 text_editor 进行编辑 → 3. 用 bash 运行测试或构建 → 4. 根据测试结果决定是否继续修改，循环往复直到任务完成。

body_en.overview: A coding agent uses the classic software development loop: text_editor reads and modifies files, bash runs tests and build commands. This is the canonical coding-agent pattern — inspect code, make an edit, run tests, repeat. Both tools are client-executed, so your application controls which files and commands are accessible.

components.name: text_editor
components.role: Read and modify source code files

components.name: bash
components.role: Run tests, build commands, and other shell operations

body_en.flow: 1. Claude inspects code with text_editor → 2. Makes edits with text_editor → 3. Runs tests or builds with bash → 4. Decides whether to continue editing based on results, looping until the task is complete.
